creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed thanks! Only a small note, there was also a shlib bump in the 
aqbanking port (fixed). And it seems that the pr web interface doesn't 
like multiple patches after each other. It shows 1 patch as downloadable  
then ignores the next and shows it as text, and so on.
